'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 57''' is the fifty-seventh issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[March 28]], [[1979]].

This issue includes part one of a four-part black & white reprinting of the unfinished story "[[The Kingdom of Ice]]", originally published in color in [[Marvel Comics|Marvel UK]]' ''[[Pizzazz]]'' magazine. The final part of the story was eventually printed in [[Star Wars Weekly 60|''Star Wars Weekly'' 60]].

==Contents==
*"[[The Kingdom of Ice!]]"
*"[[The Snow Demons!]]"
*"[[Treachery!]]"
*"The power of Warlock Part 4: Madness monster"
*"Micronauts Part 4: Death-Duel at Daytona Beach!"
